creator: cjl@qnet.com
text:
System hang with the following on the console:

	ahc0: target 1, lun 0 (sd1) timed out
	sd1(ahc0:1:0): BUS DEVICE RESET message queued
	ahc0: target 2, lun 0 (sd1) timed out

	Different occurrances are on different targets.  We've
	started keeping a history but no pattern yet.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Error occurs occasionally.  Sometimes uptimes are as much as a week,
	other times as little as a few hours.  This machine is a Usenet
	News server with articles on the two 4GB drives, overview on sd0
	and history on sd1.  It also does light UUCP news and mail.

	I can't pinpoint any particular event that triggers this.  Sometimes
	it happens during expire, sometimes not.
